parents.subject: LU-19200 lnet: Support numa in jt_import

commit.subject: LU-18998 lnet: match size of LNet fault handling
commit.message:
LU-18998 lnet: match size of LNet fault handling

Smatch reports in lnet_fault_attr_to_fault4()

__builtin_memcpy() '&attr->u' too small (16 vs 64)

This is due to struct lnet_fault_large_attr missing some
padding that is in struct lnet_fault_attr. Add the missing
padding. In the future as more rules are added to
struct lnet_fault_large_attr this padding will not matter.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Change-Id: Ib6b00b7e9a52a0be8ffb6567fe9d21c9f3478b08
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60370
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
